title: Pouteria venosa
taxonomy: Pouteria venosa is classified under the family Sapotaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the sapodilla family. This family includes various species of trees and shrubs native to tropical and subtropical regions. Pouteria venosa belongs to the genus Pouteria, a group of evergreen trees and shrubs found in tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas and the Pacific Islands. The classification of Pouteria venosa is further supported by its unique characteristics, such as its large, leathery leaves and showy white flowers. Overall, the classification of Pouteria venosa reflects its distinct characteristics and its relationships with other plants within the Sapotaceae family.
